name: Krumkaker (Curled Cakes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in order given.
2. Put 1 teaspoon of batter in the center of a preheated krumkake pan.
3. Close the lid and cook for a few minutes, turning the pan once to brown on both sides.
4. Roll the cake while still hot around the handle of a wooden cooking spoon.
5. Makes 12 to 16.
Note: These pans can be bought in specialty hardware stores. Source: Woman's Day Encyclopedia of Cookery, Vol. 8.
